## Verification commands

Use configured scripts where they apply; if a script is unavailable or not relevant, document the exact reason.

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test -- --watch=false` or `npm run test:ci`
- [ ] `npm run lint`, if configured
- [ ] `npm run format:check`, if configured
- [ ] Other:

## Risks/follow-up

-

## Content/licensing impact

- [ ] No content/licensing impact.
- [ ] New or changed bundled content needs source, license, attribution, and provenance notes.
- [ ] No unapproved official Ironsworn prose, move text, oracle text, asset text, art, icons, copied layout, screenshots, or trade dress will be added.
- [ ] Public MVP work blocks unapproved official rulebook prose.
- [ ] User-authored content remains separate from bundled app content.

## Label guidance

Use project labels later if available, such as `setup`, `maintenance`, `test`, `docs`, `content`, or `licensing`.
